commands.command: PANEFLOW_HERA_TERMINAL_ROOT=<hera-repo> PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD=shadow PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD_ARTIFACT_DIR=<paneflow-repo>/.paneflow-audit/hera-dogfood/m4-public-demo-ep004 PANEFLOW_HERA_DOGFOOD_RETENTION=scrubbed cargo test -p paneflow-app --features hera-dogfood startup_token_checkpoint_compares_after_shadow_drain

notes: The targeted shadow smoke passed with zero mismatch report files.
The configured EP-004 artifact directory was not created because the targeted smoke wrote no mismatch artifacts.
Raw local dogfood artifacts remain a Paneflow audit concern and are not copied into Hera.
